name: mcp-server-evm
description: Comprehensive blockchain services for 30+ networks, on native tokens, ERC20, NFTs, smart contracts.

rating.reason: Good documentation overall with clear tool names and adequate descriptions that explain functionality and usage context. Parameter descriptions are generally helpful with examples and constraints. However, some descriptions could be more comprehensive - many are single sentences that could benefit from additional context about limitations, use cases, or important details. The toolset demonstrates solid understanding of EVM operations but falls slightly short of excellent documentation standards.
